title: Constipation when starting solids
excerpt: Signs in babies, fiber and fluid adjustments, foods to limit, and when pediatric review is needed.
content:
## Signs

Hard pellets, straining, crying with stool, or going many days without stool (patterns vary by age).

## Diet adjustments

- Offer water with solids (small sips).
- Fiber: pear, prune puree in moderation, oats, peas.
- Continue breast milk or formula adequate for age.

## Avoid

Excessive constipating foods alone (too much rice without fruit/veg); do not give honey under 12 months.

## See a doctor for

Blood in stool, vomiting, poor feeding, or distended abdomen.

metaDescription: Relieving constipation when babies start solids — foods, fluids, and warning signs.
